text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch a glimpse of King Halo shopping at the
school store.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, why do I have a hole punch? I was looking
for pudding...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I missed lunch too. What in the world am I doing?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Trainer. No, I'm not fretting over
anything in particular.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was just wondering how best to scold the
younger students who caught colds and missed
classes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The notion of my juniors neglecting their physical well-being is simply inexcusable.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because of them, even I'm feeling under the weather... Geez.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo sighs, her expression downcast.
